rationale: Educ. Code §13.158 governs procedural terms of school district local consolidation agreements. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13. No direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 13.158. LOCAL CONSOLIDATION AGREEMENT. (a) Before issuing an order for an election under Section 13.153, the boards of trustees of the districts to be consolidated may draft a local consolidation agreement to be submitted to the registered voters in each district.
_note: Rule concerns school district consolidation procedures only; no tax or homestead exemption provisions implicated.
